command:
echo "=== SAKURA — vm-hermes .202 ==="
echo "--- systemd service ---"
systemctl status hermes --no-pager -l 2>/dev/null || systemctl status hermes-gateway --no-pager -l 2>/dev/null || echo "service name unknown - checking..."
systemctl list-units | grep -i hermes

echo "--- listening ports ---"
ss -tlnp | grep -E "8080|7600"

echo "--- recent logs ---"
ls /home/jose/.hermes/logs/ 2>/dev/null | tail -5
tail -20 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30 || journalctl -u hermes* -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null

echo "--- config env file ---"
cat /home/jose/.hermes/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -v TOKEN | grep -v KEY | head -15

echo "--- webhook test ---"
curl -s --max-time 5 https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/ | head -3 || echo "SAKURA PUBLIC URL UNREACHABLE"
